name: Premium Ergonomic Office Chair
description: High-end ergonomic office chair with lumbar support, adjustable armrests, and breathable mesh back. Features 360-degree swivel, height adjustment, and tilt mechanism. Perfect for long work hours with premium cushioning and durable base.

name: Wireless Mechanical Keyboard
description: Professional mechanical keyboard with wireless connectivity via Bluetooth 5.0. Features customizable RGB lighting, programmable keys, and hot-swap switches. Includes rechargeable battery with 40-hour battery life and aluminum frame.

name: 4K Ultra HD Webcam
description: Professional 4K webcam with auto-focus and wide-angle lens. Includes built-in stereo microphone with noise cancellation, USB 3.0 connection, and universal compatibility with major platforms. Ideal for streaming and video conferencing.

name: LED Desk Lamp with USB Charging
description: Modern LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness and color temperature. Features built-in USB charging port for phones and tablets, flexible gooseneck design, and memory function. Energy-efficient with 50,000-hour lifespan.

name: Portable SSD 1TB
description: Ultra-fast portable solid-state drive with 1TB storage capacity. Offers read speeds up to 550MB/s, USB 3.1 Type-C connection, and rugged design with shock resistance. Compact size perfect for professionals on the move.

name: Noise-Cancelling Wireless Headphones
description: Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation technology. Features 30-hour battery life, Bluetooth 5.0, touch controls, and premium sound quality. Includes carrying case and 3.5mm audio cable for wired connection.

name: Wireless Mouse with Precision Tracking
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with precision optical tracking and adjustable DPI settings. Features 2.4GHz wireless connection, 18-month battery life, and silent click technology. Compatible with Windows, Mac, and Linux systems.

name: Dual Monitor Stand Arm
description: Professional dual monitor mounting arm with full articulation. Supports monitors up to 27 inches and 10kg each. Features VESA compatibility, cable management, and smooth height/tilt adjustment for ergonomic positioning.

name: USB-C Docking Station
description: Comprehensive USB-C docking station with 7 ports including HDMI, USB 3.0, and SD card reader. Provides up to 100W power delivery for charging laptops. Aluminum construction and plug-and-play setup with universal compatibility.

name: Mechanical Keyboard Switch Tester
description: Switch tester kit containing 12 different mechanical keyboard switches. Allows users to experience various switch types before purchasing a full keyboard. Includes detailed comparison guide and mounting plate.

name: Vertical Laptop Stand
description: Sleek vertical laptop stand made from aluminum alloy. Supports laptops up to 17 inches and improves desk space utilization. Features non-slip pads and adjustable angle for optimal viewing. Minimalist design suitable for any workspace.

name: RGB Gaming Mouse Pad
description: Large RGB gaming mouse pad with 15 lighting modes and wireless charging capability. Features non-slip rubber base, premium cloth surface, and USB power connection. Size: 80x30cm, perfect for mouse and keyboard.

name: External Hard Drive 2TB
description: Reliable external hard drive with 2TB storage capacity. Features USB 3.0 connection for fast data transfer, automatic backup software, and shock-resistant design. Portable and compact for easy storage and transportation.

name: USB Hub 7-Port
description: Compact 7-port USB 3.0 hub with individual on/off switches for each port. Supports high-speed data transfer up to 5Gbps. Includes power adapter and LED indicators. Compatible with Windows, Mac, and Linux.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: Fast wireless charging pad supporting Qi standard for all compatible devices. Features 10W fast charging, LED indicator, and non-slip surface. Compact design works with most phone cases. Includes USB-C power cable.

name: Desktop Cable Organizer Kit
description: Comprehensive cable management kit including clips, sleeves, and ties. Helps organize multiple cables on desk for cleaner workspace. Reusable silicone material with adhesive backing. Includes 20 pieces of various sizes.

name: Monitor Light Bar
description: Premium monitor light bar that reduces eye strain and improves screen visibility. Features auto-brightness adjustment, flicker-free technology, and USB power connection. Mounts above monitor with adjustable brightness.

name: Laptop Cooling Pad
description: Efficient laptop cooling pad with dual fans and adjustable height. Supports laptops up to 17 inches with non-slip surface. Features USB power connection, quiet operation, and aluminum construction for better heat dissipation.

name: Mechanical Keyboard Stabilizer Set
description: Premium stabilizer set for mechanical keyboards including multiple sizes. Provides smooth and consistent key presses for spacebar and modifier keys. Includes installation guide and lubricant for optimal performance.

name: USB-C Cable 3-Pack
description: High-quality USB-C cables in 3-pack with 2m length each. Supports fast charging and data transfer up to 480Mbps. Durable braided design with reinforced connectors. Compatible with all USB-C devices.

name: Desk Organizer with Drawers
description: Multi-drawer desk organizer made from sustainable wood. Features 5 spacious drawers for storing office supplies, documents, and accessories. Minimalist design with smooth drawer operation and sturdy construction.

name: Blue Light Blocking Glasses
description: Stylish blue light blocking glasses designed for computer users. Reduces eye strain and improves sleep quality. Features anti-glare coating and UV protection. Includes protective case and cleaning cloth.

name: Monitor Screen Cleaner Kit
description: Safe and effective monitor screen cleaning kit. Includes microfiber cloth and specialized cleaning solution. Non-toxic formula suitable for all display types including LCD, LED, and OLED screens. Eco-friendly composition.

name: Mechanical Keyboard Keycap Set
description: Premium double-shot keycap set with 120+ keys. Features vibrant colors with durable ABS plastic construction. Compatible with most mechanical keyboards with standard layout. Includes specialty keys and installation tool.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Compact portable Bluetooth speaker with 360-degree sound. Features 12-hour battery life, IPX7 waterproof rating, and powerful bass. Includes carrying strap and USB-C charging. Perfect for indoor and outdoor use.
